## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Backend tests pass: `cd backend && poetry run pytest tests/unit -v`
- [ ] Agent typecheck + tests pass: `cd agent && npm run typecheck && npm test`
- [ ] Frontend typecheck + build pass: `cd frontend && npm run typecheck && npm run build`
- [ ] No new lint warnings
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)
